entries.hypothesis: Add context-aware greeting and tone matching instructions to improve greeting-with-context case
entries.reason: Champion won 2-0 with 4 draws. Candidate response to simple-hello was too enthusiastic. Candidate did not offer help in casual-hey. Both failed to trigger on good-morning.

entries.hypothesis: Add concrete example to anchor greeting tone and structure
entries.reason: Hard floor violation: eval_quality=0.500 < minimum=0.6. Tied 1-1 with champion. Example helped tone on simple-hello but champion won greeting-context with more specific React help.

entries.hypothesis: Expand description with explicit trigger phrases including good morning/afternoon/evening and greetings-with-context
entries.reason: Candidate won 3-1 with 2 draws. Trigger accuracy improved from 67% to 100% — good-morning and greeting-context now reliably trigger. Description specificity was the key lever.
